chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. The Five Elders try to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but Imu descends with overwhelming power, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa continues. Cheon Yeo-Woon faces new challenges within the Demonic Cult following events of Ch. 306.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: During a group outing at a theme park, Okarun suggests meeting up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji reveals he has been secretly channeling ki into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: Chapter 343 released April 14, 2026. Ch. 342 recap: Barou uses Karasu's strategy to dominate Shidou and scores for Japan, declaring himself the new king of Blue Lock. France's coach Rodin announces a shift to a more aggressive strategy.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization continues in Weekly Shonen Jump. Chapter 256 expected April 19, 2026.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Weekly serialization continues in Young Jump.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: Chapter 397 'Beyond an Apology' released April 14, 2026. Jiwoo's unique lightning-speed combat style is pushed to its limit by the refined techniques of international elites during the Awakened Academy arc. Chapter 398 expected April 21, 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Ongoing serialization in Shonen Jump+. Spy x Family follows roughly biweekly/monthly release cadence.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Chapter 307 expected shortly.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes in print.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026, with Volume 26 scheduled for June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death' — Flashy Flash eliminates Heavy Smoker, surprising Tanktop Master. Tatsumaki faces emerging insect swarms after seemingly defeating Aggregation. Part of the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May–June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter. Sequel 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' ended at Chapter 25 on March 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232, ending Part 2 (Academy Saga). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026. Possible Part 3 unconfirmed.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Tower of God: Urek Mazino' is ongoing.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded. Chapter 431 is the epilogue bonus chapter included in the final volume. Anime 'More' special episode adapting Ch. 431 premieres May 2, 2026.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Main series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Spin-off 'Kaiju No. 8: Relax' is actively ongoing.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication. 29 volumes total.
